landing.title: BSP Identity
landing.subtitle: Where your biological sovereignty begins.
landing.subtitle_2: No accounts, no passwords, no central database.
landing.cta_create_desc: Register your permanent identity on Arweave.
landing.cta_access_desc: Open your dashboard with your sovereignty key.

create.title: Create Your BEO
create.subtitle: Choose your unique biological domain.
create.key_desc: Ambrosio Institute does not have a copy of these 24 words. They are the only way to recover your BEO if you lose this device. Do not take a screenshot.
create.key_confirm: I have stored these 24 words safely
create.guardian_desc: You can fragment your key to 3 trusted guardians now using Shamir Secret Sharing, or skip this step and rely only on your seed phrase.
create.registering_desc:
The Institute is paying the transaction fee.
Please wait...
create.success_desc: Your BEO {{domain}} is now permanently yours.

dashboard.no_key: No biological key found on this device.

cards.consent_desc: Manage who can read and send your biological data.
cards.guardians_desc: Shamir fragments for decentralized social recovery.
cards.export_desc: Export your Ed25519 key stored in this browser.

consent.title: Issue Consent
consent.subtitle: Authorize labs and clinics to interact with your BEO.

guardians.title: Social Recovery
guardians.subtitle: Fragmentation of your key (Shamir) to 3 trusted guardians.
guardians.warning_1: 1. You will need the phones or emails of 3 highly trusted people.
guardians.warning_2: 2. Neither Ambrosio nor the Guardians will have your full key.
guardians.warning_3: 3. If you lose your Seed Phrase, you'll need 2 of 3 guardians to recover your BEO.

recover.title: Spatial Recovery
recover.subtitle: Lost access to this device? Restore your sovereignty here.
recover.social_desc: By starting this flow, a RecoveryRequest will be written to Arweave. You will need 2 of your 3 guardians to approve the key replacement.
recover.success: Sovereignty Restored! Key saved in browser successfully.
